aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Comfort Air & Heat due to missing structured data and conversational content gaps.
quick_wins: Create and add FAQ content to address common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is inactive or not utilized.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for maintenance guides or tutorials.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing them as a reliable local HVAC provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Pearland, TX' or 'best HVAC maintenance tips'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to capture AI attention.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by publishing detailed how-to guides and earning local media citations.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top answer for HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup and conversational content, causing AI to overlook them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema, conversational content, and authority signals to make Comfort Air & Heat the go-to HVAC expert in AI search results.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in voice and AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for Comfort Air & Heat!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services the top choice for AI search users.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss our AEO strategy and how it can drive more AI-driven leads to your business.
page_title: Comfort Air & Heat | Pearland's #1 HVAC Specialist
